case_title: KELLY HULLUM VS. LILIAN DABIZA ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF BOTH PARTIES (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOVEMBER 1, 2017 ORDERED DESTROYED.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS REPORT THAT THE CASE SETTLED. PLAINTIFF KELLY HULLUM IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS LILIAN DABIZA AND ALEX DABIZA ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
